info.title: AppsFlyer API
info.description: AppsFlyer is a mobile attribution and marketing analytics platform. The API provides access to raw data reports, aggregated analytics, OneLink management, audience management, app management, and server-to-server event tracking.

post.description: Create a new OneLink deep link.

get.description: Get data for a OneLink link.
Get the QR code for a OneLink link.
Retrieve push API message fields for a specific platform.

get.summary: Get event types per attributing entity
get.description: Retrieve event types per attributing entity.

put.description: Update Push API config for an app.

get.description: Get Push API config for an app.

put.description: Set the push API authentication token.

delete.description: Delete the push API authentication token.

get.description: Get retargeting ad revenue raw data.

Associate Customer User ID with AF User ID for web.
Measure first open events for PC/Console/CTV.

get.description: Get conversion value schema for advertisers.

post.description: Copy a SKAN conversion studio schema.

get.description: Get SKAN aggregated postback by arrival date.

post.description: Create or update store commission rates.
